candidates.text: Vector databases store embeddings and use nearest-neighbor retrieval to find semantically similar records.
candidates.normalized_text: Vector databases store embeddings and use nearest-neighbor retrieval to find semantically similar records.

candidates.text: Retrieval augmented generation combines retrieved context with a language model before producing an answer.

candidates.text: Building on indexing workflows, adaptive freshness budgets connect familiar retrieval operations to per-query update decisions.
candidates.normalized_text: Building on indexing workflows, adaptive freshness budgets connect familiar retrieval operations to per-query update decisions.

candidates.text: A new result shows that query-specific freshness budgets cut stale-answer errors by 31 percent without increasing median latency.
candidates.normalized_text: A new result shows that query-specific freshness budgets cut stale-answer errors by 31 percent without increasing median latency.

candidates.text: The evaluation finds that confidence-triggered reindexing reduces write amplification by 42 percent on bursty workloads.
candidates.normalized_text: The evaluation finds that confidence-triggered reindexing reduces write amplification by 42 percent on bursty workloads.

candidates.text: For teams already monitoring drift, confidence-triggered reindexing provides a bridge from familiar alerts to selective refresh actions.
candidates.normalized_text: For teams already monitoring drift, confidence-triggered reindexing provides a bridge from familiar alerts to selective refresh actions.
